ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "layer" TEXT /* Type of data collected by the sensor (e.g., temperature, traffic) */,
  "property" TEXT /* Property of the sensor (e.g., mobilitymadrid:layers) */,
  "uri" TEXT /* URI of the sensor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the sensor (e.g., latitude and longitude) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_layer FOREIGN KEY ("layer") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer (e.g., temperature, traffic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layer */,
  "data_domain" TEXT /* Domain of the data (e.g., Reactive Box, Mobility Servers) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the layer definition */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization to which the owner belongs */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility level (e.g., open, restricted) */,
  "retention_policy" TEXT /* Data retention policy (e.g., 1 year, 5 years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Summary of changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schemas" (
  "schema_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schema */,
  "schema_name" TEXT /* Name of the schema */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version of the schema */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the schema */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the schema */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the schema was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the schema */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the schema was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schema_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schemas_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Sensor that collected the data */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Layer of the data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor at the time of data collection */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data (e.g., Celsius, km/h) */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "schema_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schema used for the data */,
  "validity_status" TEXT /* Validity status of the data (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_schema_id FOREIGN KEY ("schema_id") REFERENCES schemas ("schema_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data that was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User that accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data that was validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was validated */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "validation_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the validation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validation_by FOREIGN KEY ("validation_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_owners" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Sensor that is owned */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Owner of the sensor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id", "owner_id")
)
